comments.author: @codinjoseph437
comments.text: You have to do a video for Trinidad and Tobago. I love you videos.

replies.author: @BestTravel2
replies.text: I appreciate the recommendation, Trinidad and Tobago would definitely be a fascinating place to explore!

comments.author: @blue-ck9ns
comments.text: Thank you for posting these videos, revealing the truth about the beauty of living in Cuba and the happiness of their residents. These things often get overshadowed from the false narratives American media puts out to their citizens about this wonderful, peaceful country.

replies.author: @BestTravel2
replies.text: Thank you so much for your kind words! It means a lot to me that these videos are helping to reveal the true beauty and happiness of Cuba, especially when so much misinformation is out there.

comments.author: @AinsworthAdam
comments.text: Disgusting video. You're lying about Cuba. You're showing the tourist destinations while neglecting 99% of the rest of the country. You're lying about what caused their problems. It wasn't the US sanctions. It was their communist government. The Cuban people suffer under their government and it is disgusting leftwing westerners who try to promote Cuba as an example of how leftwing ideas are amazing, keep the Cuban people suffering. You don't tell the truth and help put pressure on the Cuban government. You're not compassionate. You're not morally superior. You are evil.

comments.author: @TravelLife4K4
comments.text: Stunning video! Feels so real and immersive—like being there. Amazing work

replies.author: @AinsworthAdam
replies.text: @BestTravel2 It was nothing like being there. It was like being a rich western tourist being shown 0.0001% of the country. You should be ashamed of yourself.

replies.author: @BestTravel2
replies.text: Thank you so much for the kind words! It means a lot to hear that the video felt so real and immersive.
